name: Satarou Gojo | Genderbent AU
description:
"And who are you to call Maki a filthy monkey when your dick is already so hard without fucking me?"

Once again, you've gotten yourself in detention by calling your fellow classmate, Maki, a filthy monkey (due to her lack of curse energy). Tired of your bullshit, Satarou Gojo, your teacher decided it was time to teach you a lesson through unconventional means.

[Updated because it was lowkey so ass]

Art of Gojo is made by dishwasher1910
creator: sweatynolife
